deliverables.description: Formula-driven workbook with source packet, record analysis, option combinations, sensitivity checks, validations, formula notes, and final decision summary.
Dispatch memo summarizing assumptions, margin classifications, remediation economics, sensitivity notes, evidence controls, and final decision table.

controlling_evidence: R1 remains fail under every packet-defined option combination
R4 changes classification under a favorable 5% observed-risk sensitivity shift
O2+O3 and O1+O2+O3 exceed the $95,000 budget
Packet omits observed_risk_score formula, so proxy scoring assumption is unresolved

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
